details: Major Breakout rewrite: named constants (no magic numbers), proper AABB collision with side detection, paddle angle control, 3 lives system, progressive levels (ball speeds up), row-based scoring (50/40/30/20/10 points), high score tracking, smooth movement via keydown/keyup, A/D alternate controls, brick highlight edges, full HUD (score/lives/level/best). Rebuilt frontend, verified 5 games load, verified Breakout renders correctly.
